title: InternRobotics/InternVLA-M1
abstract:
InternVLA-M1: A Spatially Guided Vision-Language-Action Framework for Generalist Robot Policy

# InternVLA-M1 **InternVLA-M1** is a spatially guided vision-language-action framework for generalist robot policy. https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e83ae046-a503-46a8-95e4-ef381919b7f8 [ ](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.13778) [ ](https://internrobotics.github.io/internvla-m1.github.io) [ ](https://youtu.be/n129VDqJCk4) [ ](LICENSE) ## 🔥 Key Features 1. **Modular & Extensible** All core components (model architecture, training data, training strategies, evaluation pipeline) are fully decoupled, enabling independent development, debugging, and extension of each module. 2. **Dual-System and Dual-Supervision** InternVLA-M1 integrates both a language head and an action head under a unified framework, enabling collaborative training with dual supervision. 3. **Efficient Training & Fast Convergence** Learns spatial and visual priors from large-scale multimodal pretraining and transfers them via spatial prompt fine-tuning. Achieves strong performance (e.g., SOTA-level convergence on in \~2.5 epochs without separate action pretraining). ## 🎯 Target Audience 1. Users who want to leverage open-source VLMs (e.g., Qwen2.5-VL) for robot control. 2. Teams co-training action datasets jointly with multimodal (vision–language) data. 3. Researchers exploring alternative VLA architectures and training strategies. ## 📊 Experimental Results | | WindowX | Google Robot(VA) | Google Robot(VM) | LIBERO | |-------------|---------|------------------|------------------|--------| | $\pi_0$ | 27.1 | 54.8 | 58.8 | 94.2 | | GR00t | 61.9 | 44.5 | 35.2 | 93.9 | | InternVLA-M1 |**71.7** |**76.0** |**80.7** |**95.9**| # 🚀 Quick Start ## 🛠 Environment Setup ## ⚡ Quick Interactive M1 Demo Below are two collapsible examples: InternVLA-M1 chat and action prediction. InternVLA-M1 Chat Demo (image Q&A / Spatial Grounding) InternVLA-M1 Action Prediction Demo (two views) ## 📘 Examples We provide several end-to-end examples for reference: * **Reproduce InternVLA-M1 in SimplerEnv** [Example](/examples/Si
abstract_zh: InternVLA-M1是一个空间引导的视觉-语言-动作框架，用于通用机器人策略。其关键特性包括：模块化与可扩展性，所有核心组件（模型架构、训练数据、训练策略、评估流程）完全解耦；双系统与双监督，在统一框架下集成语言头和动作头，实现双监督协同训练；高效训练与快速收敛，从大规模多模态预训练中学习空间和视觉先验，并通过空间提示微调迁移，无需单独的动作预训练即可在约2.5个epoch内达到SOTA级收敛。实验结果表明，InternVLA-M1在WindowX、Google Robot(VA)、Google Robot(VM)和LIBERO基准上分别取得71.7、76.0、80.7和95.9的成绩，优于π0和GR00t等方法。
tldr_zh: 提出空间引导的VLA框架，无需动作预训练即可快速收敛并达到SOTA。
cover_zh: 机器人策略新突破｜空间引导VLA框架无需预训练，2.5个epoch反超SOTA

judge.reason: 官方VLA框架，空间引导策略，多benchmark SOTA，可落地
